context: Hard: SNS topic with public access policy and HTTP (not HTTPS) subscription

checklist.name: Catches unencrypted notification endpoint
checklist.description: Identifies that the alarm notification subscription uses HTTP instead of HTTPS, sending potentially sensitive operational alerts over an unencrypted connection

checklist.name: Catches overly permissive SNS policy
checklist.description: Identifies that the SNS topic policy grants public or overly broad access (AWS: * or similar), allowing unauthorized parties to subscribe to or read alarm notifications

checklist.name: Risk classified red or yellow
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or red — it configures security-sensitive notification infrastructure
